case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/S.F. TAX COLLECTOR VS. JOON KANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE FOR ANNIE P. NOT REPORTED. (506)
